name: It Now IDIV Index Fund
summary: It Now IDIV Index Fund is an exchange traded fund launched and managed by Banco Itaucard S.A. The fund is co-managed by Itau Unibanco S.A. It invests in public equity markets of Brazil. The fund seeks to invest in the stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. It invests in the dividend yielding stocks of companies across all market capitalizations. The fund seeks to replicate the performance of the BM&FBOVESPA Dividend Index. It Now IDIV Index Fund was formed on January 31, 2012 and is domiciled in Brazil.
